interpretation.hd95: No HD95 mask-Wasserstein corollary is asserted.
interpretation.monte_carlo: True conditional risks and paired transport costs are Monte Carlo estimates with separately reported posterior-integration SE.
interpretation.target: misspecification of Q_p under known mask-posterior couplings
interpretation.total_variation: exact for all four constructed finite posterior laws
interpretation.wasserstein: Jaccard/full-HD paired costs upper-bound optimal mask transport; scalar empirical pushforward W1 applies to all losses.
